name: Frosted Liver Paté
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mash the Braunschweiger with a fork.
2. Add the mayonnaise, finely chopped onion, 1 garlic clove, and basil leaves to the mashed Braunschweiger. Mix well.
3. Mound the mixture on a plate and cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
4. In a small bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, 1 crushed garlic clove, hot pepper sauce, and mayonnaise.
5. Frost the chilled Braunschweiger with the cream cheese mixture.
6. Refrigerate until serving time.
7. Just before serving, garnish with pimiento and parsley.
8. Serve with dark rye snack bread or crackers.
Makes 3-1/2 cups.
Per tablespoon: 60 calories.
